queries.question: Show me the role that is in common for all editorial teams.
queries.sql: SELECT Roles.RoleName  from Editorial_Teams_Roles join Roles on Editorial_Teams_Roles.RoleID = Roles.RoleID join Editorial_Teams on Editorial_Teams_Roles.TeamID = Editorial_Teams.TeamID   GROUP BY Editorial_Teams_Roles.RoleID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Editorial_Teams_Roles.TeamID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Editorial_Teams)

queries.question: Give me the role associated with each editorial team.
queries.sql: select editorial_teams.teamname , roles.rolename from Editorial_Teams_Roles join Roles on Editorial_Teams_Roles.RoleID = Roles.RoleID join Editorial_Teams on Editorial_Teams_Roles.TeamID = Editorial_Teams.TeamID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?teamname ?rolename WHERE {
  ?editorial_teams_roles a :Editorial_Teams_Roles .
  ?roles a :Roles .
  ?editorial_teams_roles p:hasRoles ?roles .
  ?editorial_teams a :Editorial_Teams .
  ?editorial_teams_roles p:hasEditorial_Teams ?editorial_teams .
  ?editorial_teams p:TeamName ?teamname .
  ?roles p:RoleName ?rolename .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the role associated with each editorial team.
